Part.Source:
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod if FilTConCod.IsEmpty() or FilTConCod.IsNull() FilTConCod = 1 &TConCod = 1 commit Else &TConCod = FilTConCod EndIF
Exit EndFor
&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3 = new()
For Each Order EmpCod, TConCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TConCod = &TConCod
&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon002_FilialFaturamento = TCon002 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon005_TipoCliente = TCon005 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon019_LctoOrcamento = TCon019 &sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon020_ClientePadraoVista = TCon020 &sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon021_BloquearVendaAreaDiferente = TCon021 &sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon039_TipoLancamentoPDV = TCon039 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon044_PlanoRecCliente = TCon044 &sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon058_DigitandoPedido = TCon058 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon081_TipoFrete = TCon081 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon133_BloqPedDebCliente = TCon133 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon135_BloquearColuna = TCon135 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon138_TrocarVendedor = TCon138 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon152_TrocarTransportador = TCon152 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon155_TipLancamentoIniciarVenda = TCon155 &SdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon185_BloquearColunaVendaaVista = TCon185 &sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon193_SomenteOrcamentoVendaTelevendas = TCon193
// &sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon017_DescMax = TCon017 //&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon033_MaiorQtdVendida = TCon033 //&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon052_ServicoDuplicadoVenda = TCon052 //&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.Tcon053_ProdutoDuplicadoVenda = TCon053 ///&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon087_QuantidadeInicial = TCon087 //&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon089_ExecutarSonsErro = TCon089 //&sdtConfig_wwpVendas_3.TCon110_SolicitarSenha = TCon110
Exit EndFor
